prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Nausea, reduced appetite, and fatigue over the last 1-2 months with ongoing renal function decline.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Alzheimer's Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.8 kg; Height 162.6 cm; BMI 19.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.1kg; 9 months ago 47.8kg; 6 months ago 47.1kg; 3 months ago 49.1kg; current 50.8kg), Height (12 months ago 162.6cm; 9 months ago 162.6cm; 6 months ago 162.6cm; 3 months ago 162.6cm; current 162.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 146mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 38U/L; 6 months ago 45U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 39U/L), AST (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 54U/L; 3 months ago 57U/L; current 51U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 816mg/g; 9 months ago 876mg/g; 6 months ago 867mg/g; 3 months ago 884mg/g; current 950mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 122mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.85 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
